title: AmongCraft
description: A Mod aiming to recreate Among Us in Minecraft
body:
# ඞ AmongCraft
## ⚠️WARNING: this is NOT finished and wont be probably, and the game functionality also doesnt work, I just published this because I felt like it⚠️
AmongCraft brings the thrilling deception and teamwork of Among Us into the world of Minecraft using the Fabric modding platform. This multiplayer-focused mod transforms your server into a full social deduction game with impostors, crewmates, tasks, sabotage, emergency meetings, and more!

## 🔧 Features

- Blocks and items
  - Task, Emergency button, door, and other blocks
  - Impostor and crewmate items
- All the roles from The game and extra roles aswell
- A full minigame mechanic with custom lobbies and maps, supporting custom maps, but there are pre-built maps aswell
- Others
  


## 🎮 Gameplay Highlights

Sneak through vents as the Impostor

Perform interactive tasks as a Crewmate – each task has its own minigame

Use the Killer Knife to eliminate others, then hide and deceive

Call emergency meetings, vote players out, and survive till the end!

> Disclaimer: This mod is not affiliated with, endorsed, or sponsored by Innersloth LLC. Among Us and all related assets are the property of Innersloth LLC. © Innersloth LLC. All rights reserved.
